name: Isidor
typography: Mono + sans-serif. All technical data in JetBrains Mono. Headlines in Inter Bold.
animation: Cursor blink and hover underline only. No decorative motion.
key_lesson: Technical honesty = trust without words. Minimal AI landing should feel like a serious tool, not a toy.
embedding_text: Isidor AI landing page. Dark background #0D0D0D. Single CTA button. All metrics and technical data displayed in monospace font. Section numbering with 01, 02 pattern. Hover states with subtle underlines. No decorative animations. Professional AI tool aesthetic.

name: Factory
typography: JetBrains Mono for all data. Inter for UI. Tab labels in mono uppercase.
animation: Status bar pulse. Console typing effect. No heavy animations.
key_lesson: IDE as landing page — legitimizes AI as serious equipment. Factory proves that developer aesthetic = trust signal for AI tools.
embedding_text: Factory AI dashboard. IDE-inspired layout with tabs, console panel, and status bar. Dark theme with cyan and purple accents. Monospace typography throughout. Terminal-style console output. Tab-based navigation. Professional developer tool aesthetic.

name: Letta
typography: Inter for UI. Mono for model versions and steps.
key_lesson: Agentic AI needs transparency layers — show memory states, model versions, processing steps. Users trust what they can see.
embedding_text: Letta agentic AI platform. Shows memory states and processing steps transparently. Model version badges. Step-by-step visualization of agent reasoning. Clean dark interface. Green success states. Purple AI indicators.

name: Wist AI
typography: Inter. Mono for timestamps only.
animation: Skeleton loading states. No decorative animation.
key_lesson: AI chat interface should feel functional, not flashy. Wist proves minimal = professional for AI communication tools.
embedding_text: Wist AI chat interface. Ultra-minimal functional design. Light background with dark accents. Blue primary color. Skeleton loading states. No decorative elements. Professional messaging aesthetic.

name: DeepJudge
typography: Serif headlines. Sans-serif body. Mono for legal codes.
animation: Subtle fade transitions. No motion for motion's sake.
key_lesson: Legal AI = trust by design. DeepJudge uses minimal dark aesthetic to convey seriousness and reliability.
embedding_text: DeepJudge legal AI platform. Dark professional interface. Trust signals prominently displayed. Legal document analysis. Minimal design conveying reliability. Blue accents for primary actions. Clean typography hierarchy.

name: Sort
typography: Inter Bold headlines. Inter Regular body.
key_lesson: One screen, one verb, zero distractions. Sort is the perfect example of SaaS minimalism — if you can't explain it on one page, you don't understand it yet.
embedding_text: Sort todo app. One page, one verb, one action. Ultra-minimal white background. Single blue CTA. No navigation, no menus, no distractions. Focus mode UI. Perfect example of radical SaaS simplicity.

name: Folk
typography: Inter. Mono for metadata.
animation: Hover lift on cards. No blocking animations.
key_lesson: CRM should feel like an archive, not a corporate dashboard. Folk's bento grid makes data scannable without overwhelming.
embedding_text: Folk CRM platform. Bento grid layout for contacts. Modular card system. Archive aesthetic. Light background with dark text. Blue accents. Scannable without being corporate. Personal contact management reimagined.

name: Antimetal
typography: Inter Bold for numbers. Mono for data labels.
animation: Number countup on scroll. No decorative motion.
key_lesson: Fintech/cloud dashboards should lead with numbers. Antimetal shows that metrics as the main visual element = instant clarity.
embedding_text: Antimetal cloud cost analytics. Metrics as hero elements. Dark background with colored data visualizations. Cyan and green accents for positive metrics. Yellow/red for alerts. Mono data labels. Number-first dashboard design.

name: PostHog
typography: Inter. Mono for code and metrics.
animation: Orange pulse for live data. Minimal UI transitions.
key_lesson: Developer tools don't need to look flashy. PostHog proves technical honesty and documentation-style UI = credibility.
embedding_text: PostHog product analytics. Developer-first dark interface. Technical documentation style layout. Orange primary accent. Open source credibility. Mono for metrics. Engineering aesthetic without being cold.

name: Composio
typography: JetBrains Mono. Inter for prose.
animation: Card hover effects. No blocking animations.
key_lesson: Developer tools should document themselves through their landing page. Composio's docs-style UI = instant credibility for MCP integrations.
embedding_text: Composio MCP integration platform. Documentation-style landing page. Dark theme with purple and cyan accents. Technical integration cards. Mono typography for code. Developer-first approach.

name: Sandbar
typography: Serif headlines. Sans body. Mono for numbers.
key_lesson: Financial products need trust through clarity. Sandbar's minimal approach says 'we're so confident in our rates, we don't need to hide them.'
embedding_text: Sandbar financial platform. Clean minimal financial interface. Trust through simplicity. Blue accents. Number-focused display. Light background with strong typography. Professional fintech aesthetic.

name: Will Phan
typography: Inter. Mono for indices and metadata.
key_lesson: Personal sites should feel alive without being distracting. Will Phan's live time + archive list = presence without noise.
embedding_text: Will Phan portfolio. Archive-style project list with live time display. Minimal personal website. Index-based navigation. Blue accents. Clean typography. Human presence through contextual data.

name: Karl.Works
typography: Mono throughout. Inter for brief descriptions.
key_lesson: Coordinates as identity. Karl.Works uses geo-coordinates to signal 'I'm a global developer, here's my location anchor.'
embedding_text: Karl.Works personal portfolio. Dark minimal interface. Geo-coordinates as visual anchor. Engineering aesthetic. Mono typography throughout. Blue accent color. Technical personal brand.

name: iamrobin
typography: Mono throughout. No other font.
key_lesson: Mono-only portfolios signal 'I write code for a living.' iamrobin proves that extreme consistency = strong identity.
embedding_text: iamrobin personal portfolio. Monospace-only typography. Indexed navigation. Live contextual data. Dark background with cyan accents. Technical developer aesthetic. Extreme typographic consistency.

name: Matt Rothenberg
typography: Inter. Mono for dates.
key_lesson: Portfolio as archive with clear indexing. Matt shows that structure + minimal chrome = projects that speak for themselves.
embedding_text: Matt Rothenberg portfolio. Archive-style project list. Dark theme with purple accents. Clear project indexing. Minimal chrome. Engineering aesthetic. Projects displayed as structured archive.

name: Jason Reynolds
typography: Single font only.
key_lesson: Extreme minimalism is a statement. Jason Reynolds' site says 'my work is so strong, it needs zero decoration.'
embedding_text: Jason Reynolds extreme minimal portfolio. Single page with maximum reduction. Dark background. Minimal text. Experimental approach. Work speaks louder than design.

name: Vogelhaus
typography: Serif headlines. Sans body.
key_lesson: Warm neutrals + strong typography = German precision meets human warmth. Vogelhaus shows agencies can be minimal AND warm.
embedding_text: Vogelhaus creative agency. Warm neutral background. Editorial layout. Typography as main design element. German precision. Minimal without being cold. Agency portfolio reimagined.

name: Basement Studio
typography: Inter. Mono for technical details.
key_lesson: Dark + engineering aesthetic = agency that builds, not just designs. Basement Studio's approach signals 'we can execute, not just conceptualize.'
embedding_text: Basement Studio creative agency. Dark professional interface. Engineering craft aesthetic. Case study focused. Purple accents. Minimal without being sterile. Technical execution demonstrated through design.

name: Xapo Bank
typography: Serif headlines. Sans body. Mono for numbers.
key_lesson: Crypto + banking = trust double-down. Xapo's luxury dark aesthetic says 'your money is safe here, AND we're cutting edge.'
embedding_text: Xapo Bank crypto banking platform. Luxury dark interface. Banking trust signals. Cyan and green accents. Premium financial aesthetic. Crypto meets traditional finance credibility.

name: Eclipse
typography: Mono throughout.
key_lesson: Blockchain infra needs developer credibility. Eclipse's mono + technical UI = 'we're building for builders.'
embedding_text: Eclipse blockchain infrastructure. Technical developer-focused interface. Mono typography. Orange and purple accents. Dark theme. Protocol status displays. Builder credibility.
